creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Nov  6 21:54:42 2013
New Revision: 333039
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333039

Log:
  devel/dev86: update to 0.16.20
  
  - Update to 0.16.20 [1]
  - Allow staging
  
  PR:		ports/183701 [1]
  Submitted by:	Philip Schulz <phs deadc0.de> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/dev86/Makefile
  head/devel/dev86/distinfo
  head/devel/dev86/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/dev86/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/dev86/Makefile	Wed Nov  6 20:03:31 2013	(r333038)
+++ head/devel/dev86/Makefile	Wed Nov  6 21:54:42 2013	(r333039)
@@ -2,24 +2,22 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	dev86
-PORTVERSION=	0.16.18
+PORTVERSION=	0.16.20
 CATEGORIES=	devel
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.debath.co.uk/dev86/ \
+MASTER_SITES=	http://v3.sk/~lkundrak/dev86/archive/ \
 		http://tmp.chruetertee.ch/ \
 		http://disasterarea.chruetertee.ch/
 DISTNAME=	Dev86src-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	phs@deadc0.de
-COMMENT=	Robert de Bath's 8086 development tools
+COMMENT=	8086 development tools
 
 CONFLICTS=	bcc-[0-9]* \
 		bin86-[0-9]*
 
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
+DESTDIRNAME=	DIST
 
-MAN1=		as86.1 bcc.1 elks.1 elksemu.1 ld86.1
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 # Respect CFLAGS in Makefiles.
 	@${GREP} -Rl 'CFLAGS=' ${WRKSRC} | ${XARGS} ${REINPLACE_CMD} -i "" \

==============================================================================

+SHA256 (Dev86src-0.16.20.tar.gz) = 61817a378c8c8ba65f36c6792d457a305dc4eedae8cdc8b6233bf2bb28e5fe8d
+SIZE (Dev86src-0.16.20.tar.gz) = 717091

Modified: head/devel/dev86/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/dev86/pkg-plist	Wed Nov  6 20:03:31 2013	(r333038)
+++ head/devel/dev86/pkg-plist	Wed Nov  6 21:54:42 2013	(r333039)
@@ -20,5 +20,10 @@ lib/bcc/rules.i
 lib/bcc/rules.net
 lib/bcc/rules.start
 lib/bcc/unproto
+man/man1/as86.1.gz
+man/man1/bcc.1.gz
+man/man1/elks.1.gz
+man/man1/elksemu.1.gz
+man/man1/ld86.1.gz
 @dirrm lib/bcc/i386
 @dirrm lib/bcc
